Isaiah40:4 Za a cike kowane kwari
Isaiah40:5 Sa'an nan za a bayyana ɗaukakar Ubangiji

Isaiah40:7 Ciyawa takan bushe
Isaiah40:8 Hakika ciyawa takan bushe

Isaiah40:11 Zai lura da garkensa kamar yadda makiyayi suke yi

Isaiah57:10 Kun damu saboda nisan hanyarku

Isaiah60:1 Ki tashi

Jeremiah34:1 Ubangiji ya yi magana da Irmiya sa'ad da Nebukadnezzar
Jeremiah34:2 Ubangiji Allah na Isra'ila ya ce wa Irmiya ya tafi
Jeremiah34:3 Ba za ka tsere masa ba
Jeremiah34:4 Ya Zadakiya
Jeremiah34:5 Za ka mutu da salama. Kamar yadda aka ƙona wa sarakuna marigayanka turare
Jeremiah34:6 Sai annabi Irmiya ya faɗa wa Zadakiya

Jeremiah34:8 Ubangiji kuma ya yi magana da Irmiya bayan da Zadakiya ya yi alkawari da dukan mutanen Urushalima don a yi musu shelar ba da 'yanci
Jeremiah34:9 cewa kowa ya saki bayinsa

Jeremiah34:11 Daga baya kuwa suka sāke komo da waɗannan bayi

Jeremiah34:13 “Ni Ubangiji Allah na Isra'ila
Jeremiah34:14 ‘A shekara ta bakwai

Jeremiah34:17 Domin haka ni Ubangiji na ce
Jeremiah34:18 Mutanen da suka keta alkawarina
Jeremiah34:19 wato manyan fādawan Yahuza
Jeremiah34:20 zan bashe su a hannun abokan gabansu waɗanda suke neman ransu. Gawawwakinsu za su zama abincin tsuntsaye da namomin jeji.

Jeremiah36:1 A sa'ad da Yehoyakim ɗan Yosiya
Jeremiah36:2 “Ka ɗauki takarda
Jeremiah36:3 Mai yiwuwa ne idan mutanen Yahuza suka ji dukan masifar da na yi niyya in aukar musu da ita
Jeremiah36:4 Sai Irmiya ya kirawo Baruk ɗan Neriya. Baruk kuwa ya rubuta maganar da Irmiya ya faɗa masa a takarda
Jeremiah36:5 Sai Irmiya ya umarci Baruk
Jeremiah36:6 saboda haka kai za ka tafi. A ranar azumi za ka karanta wa mutane maganar Ubangiji
Jeremiah36:7 Mai yiwuwa ne za su roƙi Ubangiji
Jeremiah36:8 Sai Baruk ɗan Neriya ya yi dukan abin da annabi Irmiya ya umarce shi. Ya karanta takardan nan ta maganar Ubangiji a Haikalin Ubangiji.
Jeremiah36:9 A watan tara a shekara ta biyar ta sarautar Yehoyakim ɗan Yosiya
Jeremiah36:10 Sai Baruk ya karanta maganar Irmiya wadda take a takardar
Jeremiah36:11 Sa'ad da Mikaiya ɗan Gemariya
Jeremiah36:12 sai ya gangara gidan sarki
Jeremiah36:13 Sai Mikaiya ya faɗa musu dukan maganar da ya ji sa'ad da Baruk ya karanta littafin a kunnuwan jama'a.
Jeremiah36:14 Sai dukan sarakunan suka aiki Yehudi ɗan Netaniya
Jeremiah36:15 Suka ce masa ya zauna
Jeremiah36:16 Da suka ji dukan maganar
Jeremiah36:17 Suka kuma tambayi Baruk
Jeremiah36:18 Sai Baruk ya ce musu
Jeremiah36:19 Sarakunan kuwa suka ce wa Baruk
Jeremiah36:20 Suka tafi zauren sarki bayan sun ajiye littafin a ɗakin Elishama
Jeremiah36:21 Sarki ya aiki Yehudi ya je ya kawo littafin. Sai ya je ya ɗauko littafin daga ɗakin Elishama magatakarda. Yehudi kuwa ya karanta wa sarki tare da dukan sarakunan da suke tsaye kewaye da sarkin.

Jeremiah36:23 Da Yehudi ya karanta sakin layi uku ko huɗu sai sarki ya sa wuƙa ya yanke su

Jeremiah48:26 “Ku sa Mowab ta yi maye domin ta tayar wa Ubangiji. Za ta yi birgima cikin amanta
Jeremiah48:27 Kin yi wa mutanen Isra'ila dariya. A kowane lokacin da kika ambaci sunansu
Jeremiah48:28 “Ku mazaunan Mowab
Jeremiah48:29 Mun ji labarin girmankan Mowab
Jeremiah48:30 Ni Ubangiji na san Mowab tana da girmankai
Jeremiah48:31 Don haka zan yi kuka saboda Mowab duka
Jeremiah48:32 Zan yi kuka saboda kurangar inabin Sibma Fiye da yadda zan yi kuka saboda mutanen Yazar. Rassanku sun haye teku har sun kai Yazar
Jeremiah48:33 An ɗauke farin ciki da murna daga ƙasa mai albarka ta Mowab
Jeremiah48:34 “Mutanen Heshbon da na Eleyale suna kururuwa ana iya jin kururuwansu a Yahaza. Ana iya jinta kuma a Zowar
Jeremiah48:35 Zan hana mutanen Mowab miƙa hadayu na ƙonawa a tuddai
Jeremiah48:36 “Zuciyata tana makoki domin Mowab da Kir-heres kamar wanda yake kukan makoki da sarewa saboda wadatarsu ta ƙare.
Jeremiah48:37 Gama kowa ya aske kansa da gemunsa
Jeremiah48:38 Ba abin da ake yi a bisa kan soraye da dandali na Mowab sai baƙin ciki
Jeremiah48:39 An farfashe Mowab
Jeremiah48:40 “Ni Ubangiji na ce
Jeremiah48:41 Za a ci garuruwa da kagarai da yaƙi
Jeremiah48:42 Za a hallaka Mowab daga zaman al'umma
Jeremiah48:43 Tsoro
Jeremiah48:44 Wanda ya guje wa tsoro
Jeremiah48:45 “A ƙarƙashin inuwar Heshbon 'yan gudun hijira suna tsaye ba ƙarfi. Gama wuta ta ɓullo daga Heshbon
Jeremiah48:46 Kaitonku
Jeremiah48:47 “Amma zan komar da mutanen Mowab nan gaba
Jeremiah49:1 Wannan shi ne abin da Ubangiji ya faɗa akan Ammonawa
Jeremiah49:2 Domin haka lokaci yana zuwa
Jeremiah49:3 “Ki yi kuka
Jeremiah49:4 Me ya sa kuke taƙama da ƙarfinku
Jeremiah49:5 Ga shi
Jeremiah49:6 “Amma daga baya zan sa Ammonawa su wadata kuma
Jeremiah49:7 Ga abin da Ubangiji Mai Runduna ya faɗa a kan Edom
Jeremiah49:8 Ku mazaunan Dedan
Jeremiah49:9 Idan masu tsinkar 'ya'yan inabi sun zo wurinka Ba za su rage abin kala ba? Idan kuma ɓarayi sun zo da dare
Jeremiah49:10 Amma na tsiraita Isuwa sarai
Jeremiah49:11 Ka bar marayunka
Jeremiah49:12 Ubangiji ya ce
Jeremiah49:13 Gama ni Ubangiji na rantse da zatina
Jeremiah49:14 Irmiya ya ce
Jeremiah49:15 Gama ga shi
Jeremiah49:16 Tsoronki da ake ji da girmankanki sun ruɗe ki
Jeremiah49:17 Ubangiji ya ce
Jeremiah49:18 Abin da zai faru ga Edom zai zama daidai da abin da ya faru ga Saduma
Jeremiah49:19 Kamar yadda zaki yakan fito daga cikin kurmin Urdun
Jeremiah49:20 Domin haka
Jeremiah49:21 Amon fāɗuwarsu zai sa ƙasa ta girgiza
Jeremiah49:22 Wani zai tashi da sauri
Jeremiah49:23 Ga abin da Ubangiji ya faɗa a kan Dimashƙu
Jeremiah49:24 Dimashƙu ta yi halin ƙaƙa naka yi
Jeremiah49:25 Ƙaƙa aka manta da sanannen birni
Jeremiah49:26 A waccan rana samarinta za su fāɗi a dandalinta. Za a hallaka sojojinta duka
Jeremiah49:27 Zan kuma sa wuta a garun Dimashƙu
Jeremiah49:28 Ga abin da Ubangiji ya faɗa a kan Kedar da sarakunan Hazor
Jeremiah49:29 Za a kwashe alfarwansu da garkunansu
Jeremiah49:30 “Ku mazaunan Hazor
Jeremiah49:31 Ku tashi ku fāɗa wa al'ummar da take zama lami lafiya
Jeremiah49:32 “Za a washe raƙumansu da garkunan shanunsu ganima
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor za ta zama kufai har abada
Jeremiah49:34 Maganar da Ubangiji ya yi wa annabi Irmiya a kan Elam a farkon sarautar Zadakiya Sarkin Yahuza.
Jeremiah49:35 Ubangiji Mai Runduna ya ce
Jeremiah49:36 Zan sa iska ta hura a kan Elam daga kusurwoyi huɗu na samaniya. Za ta watsar da mutane ko'ina
Jeremiah49:37 Zan sa mutanen Elam su ji tsoron maƙiyansu waɗanda suke neman ransu. Da zafin fushina zan kawo musu masifa
Jeremiah49:38 Zan kafa gadon sarautata a Elam
Jeremiah49:39 Amma daga baya zan sa Elam kuma ta wadata. Ni Ubangiji na faɗa.”
Jeremiah50:1 Jawabin da Ubangiji ya yi wa annabi Irmiya a kan Babila da ƙasar Kaldiyawa ke nan
Jeremiah50:2 “Ku ba da labari ga sauran al'umma
Jeremiah50:3 “Wata al'umma za ta taso daga arewa gāba da ita
Jeremiah50:4 Ubangiji ya ce
Jeremiah50:5 Za su tambayi hanyar Sihiyona
Jeremiah50:6 “Mutanena sun zama kamar ɓatattun tumaki
Jeremiah50:7 Duk waɗanda suka same su
Jeremiah50:8 “Ku gudu daga cikin Babila
Jeremiah50:9 Ga shi
Jeremiah50:10 Za a washe Kaldiyawa
Jeremiah50:11 “Saboda kuna murna
Jeremiah50:12 Domin haka za a kunyatar da Babila sosai
Jeremiah50:13 Saboda fushin Ubangiji
Jeremiah50:14 “Dukanku 'yan baka
Jeremiah50:15 Ku kewaye ta da kuwwar yaƙi! Ta ba da gari
Jeremiah50:16 Ku datse wa Babila mai shuka
Jeremiah50:17 “Isra'ilawa kamar tumaki ne waɗanda zakuna suka bi su suna kora. Da farko dai Sarkin Assuriya ne ya cinye su. Yanzu kuwa Sarkin Babila
Jeremiah50:18 Saboda haka ni Ubangiji Mai Runduna
Jeremiah50:19 Zan komar da Isra'ila a makiyayarsa
Jeremiah50:20 Ni Ubangiji na ce sa'ad da lokacin nan ya yi za a nemi laifi da zunubi a cikin Isra'ila da Yahuza
Jeremiah50:21 “Ku haura ku fāɗa wa ƙasar Meratayim da mazaunan Fekod. Ku kashe
Jeremiah50:22 Hargowar yaƙi tana cikin ƙasar
Jeremiah50:23 Ga yadda aka karya gudumar dukan duniya! Ga yadda Babila ta zama abar ƙyama ga sauran al'umma!
Jeremiah50:24 Na kafa miki tarko
Jeremiah50:25 Ubangiji ya buɗe taskar makamansa
Jeremiah50:26 Ku zo
Jeremiah50:27 Ku kashe dukan bijimanta
Jeremiah50:28 Ku ji
Jeremiah50:29 “Ku kirawo 'yan baka
Jeremiah50:30 Domin haka samarinta za su fāɗi a tituna. Za a hallaka sojojinta duka a wannan rana
Jeremiah50:31 “Ga shi
Jeremiah50:32 Mai girmankai za ta yi tuntuɓe ta fāɗi
Jeremiah50:33 “Ni Ubangiji Mai Runduna na ce
Jeremiah50:34 Mai fansarsu mai ƙarfi ne
Jeremiah50:35 Ni Ubangiji na ce
Jeremiah50:36 Akwai takobi a kan masu sihiri Don su zama wawaye. Akwai takobi a kan jarumawanta Don a hallaka su.
Jeremiah50:37 Akwai takobi a kan mahayan dawakanta
Jeremiah50:38 Fari zai sa ruwanta ya ƙafe
Jeremiah50:39 “Domin haka namomin jeji da diloli za su zauna a Babila
Jeremiah50:40 Abin da ya faru da Saduma da Gwamrata
Jeremiah50:41 “Ga mutane suna zuwa daga arewa
Jeremiah50:42 Suna riƙe da baka da māshi
Jeremiah50:43 Sarkin Babila ya ji labarinsu
Jeremiah50:44 “Ni Ubangiji ina zuwa kamar zakin da yake fitowa daga kurmin Urdun zuwa makiyaya. Nan da nan zan sa su gudu daga gare ta. Sa'an nan zan naɗa mata wanda na zaɓa. Wa yake kama da ni? Wa zai yi ƙarata? Wane shugaba zai yi gāba da ni?
Jeremiah50:45 Saboda haka ku ji shirin da Ubangiji ya yi gāba da Babila
Jeremiah50:46 Duniya za ta girgiza sa'ad da ta ji an ci Babila da yaƙi. Za a ji kukanta cikin sauran al'umma.”
Jeremiah51:1 Ubangiji ya ce
Jeremiah51:2 Zan aika da masu casawa zuwa Babila
Jeremiah51:3 Kada ku bar maharbi ya yi harbi da bakansa
Jeremiah51:4 Za su fāɗi matattu a ƙasar Kaldiyawa
Jeremiah51:5 Allah na Isra'ila da Yahuza
Jeremiah51:6 Ku gudu daga cikin Babila
Jeremiah51:7 Babila ta zama ƙoƙon zinariya a hannun Ubangiji
Jeremiah51:8 Farat ɗaya
Jeremiah51:9 Mun ba Babila magani
Jeremiah51:10 Ubangiji ya baratar da mu a fili
Jeremiah51:11 Ku wasa kibau
Jeremiah51:12 Ku ta da tuta don a faɗa wa garun Babila
Jeremiah51:13 Ƙarshenki ya zo
Jeremiah51:14 Ubangiji Mai Runduna ya rantse da zatinsa
Jeremiah51:15 Ubangiji ne ya halicci ƙasa da ikonsa
Jeremiah51:16 Bisa ga umarninsa ruwan da yake samaniya yakan yi ruri
Jeremiah51:17 Kowane ɗan adam wawa ne
Jeremiah51:18 Su marasa amfani ne
Jeremiah51:19 Amma wanda yake wajen Yakubu ba haka yake ba
Jeremiah51:20 Ubangiji ya ce
Jeremiah51:21 Da kai ne na karya doki da mahayinsa
Jeremiah51:22 Da kai ne na farfasa karusa da mahayinsa. Da kai ne na kakkarya mace da namiji
Jeremiah51:23 Da kai ne na kakkarya makiyayi da garkensa
Jeremiah51:24 Ubangiji ya ce
Jeremiah51:25 Ga shi
Jeremiah51:26 Ba za a sami dutsen yin kusurwa
Jeremiah51:27 Ku ta da tuta a duniya
Jeremiah51:28 Ku shirya ƙasashe su yi yaƙi da ita
Jeremiah51:29 Duniya ta girgiza
Jeremiah51:30 Sojojin Babila sun daina yaƙi
Jeremiah51:31 Maguji yana biye da maguji a guje
Jeremiah51:32 An ƙwace mashigai An ƙone fadamu da wuta
Jeremiah51:33 Ni Ubangiji Mai Runduna
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadnezzar
Jeremiah51:35 Bari mutanen Sihiyona su ce
Jeremiah51:36 Ubangiji ya ce
Jeremiah51:37 Babila za ta zama tarin juji
Jeremiah51:38 Mutanen Babila za su yi ruri kamar zakuna
Jeremiah51:39 Sa'ad da suke cike da haɗama zan yi musu biki
Jeremiah51:40 Zan kai su mayanka kamar 'yan raguna
Jeremiah51:41 “An ci Babila
Jeremiah51:42 Teku ta malalo a kan Babila
Jeremiah51:43 Garuruwanta sun zama abin ƙyama
Jeremiah51:44 Zan hukunta Bel
Jeremiah51:45 “Ku fito daga cikinta
Jeremiah51:46 Kada zuciyarku ta yi suwu
Jeremiah51:47 Saboda haka kwanaki suna zuwa
Jeremiah51:48 Sa'an nan sama da duniya
Jeremiah51:49 Babila za ta fāɗi
Jeremiah51:50 Ku waɗanda kuka tsere wa takobi! Ku gudu! Kada ku tsaya! Ku tuna da Ubangiji a can nesa inda kuke
Jeremiah51:51 Mun sha kunya saboda zargin da ake yi mana
Jeremiah51:52 “Domin haka kwanaki suna zuwa
Jeremiah51:53 Ko da Babila za ta hau samaniya
Jeremiah51:54 Ku ji muryar kuka daga Babila
Jeremiah51:55 Gama Ubangiji yana lalatar da Babila
Jeremiah51:56 Gama mai hallakarwa ya auka wa Babila
Jeremiah51:57 “Zan sa mahukuntanta
Jeremiah51:58 “Ni Ubangiji Mai Runduna
Jeremiah51:59 Jawabin da annabi Irmiya ya ba Seraiya
Jeremiah51:60 Irmiya ya rubuta a littafi dukan masifun da za su auko wa Babila
Jeremiah51:61 Irmiya kuwa ya ce wa Seraiya
Jeremiah51:62 Ka kuma ce
Jeremiah51:63 Sa'ad da ka gama karanta wannan littafi
Jeremiah51:64 Sa'an nan ka ce
Jeremiah52:1 Zadakiya yana da shekara ashirin da ɗaya sa'ad da ya ci sarauta. Ya yi mulki a Urushalima shekara goma sha ɗaya. Sunan uwarsa Hamutal
Jeremiah52:2 Sarki Zadakiya ya aikata abin da yake mugu a gaban Ubangiji kamar yadda Sarki Yehoyakim ya yi.
Jeremiah52:3 Al'amarin ya zama da muni ƙwarai a cikin Isra'ila da Yahuza
Jeremiah52:4 A kan rana ta goma ga watan goma
Jeremiah52:5 An kewaye birnin da yaƙi har shekara ta goma sha ɗaya ta mulkin Zadakiya.
Jeremiah52:6 A kan rana ta tara a watan huɗu na wannan shekara
Jeremiah52:7 Sai aka huda garun birnin
Jeremiah52:8 Amma sojojin Kaldiyawa suka runtumi sarki Zadakiya
Jeremiah52:9 Da aka kama Zadakiya
Jeremiah52:10 Ya kuwa kashe 'ya'yan Zadakiya a idonsa. Ya kuma kashe dukan shugabannin Yahuza a Ribla.
Jeremiah52:11 Sa'an nan ya ƙwaƙule idanun Zadakiya
Jeremiah52:12 A kan rana ta goma ga watan biyar a shekara ta goma sha tara ta sarautar Nebukadnezzar
Jeremiah52:13 Sai ya ƙone Haikalin Ubangiji
Jeremiah52:14 Sojojin Kaldiyawa da suke tare da shugaban matsara
Jeremiah52:15 Sa'an nan Nebuzaradan shugaban matsara ya kwashe waɗansu matalauta
Jeremiah52:16 Amma ya bar waɗansu matalauta na gaske a ƙasar don su yi aiki a gonakin inabi
Jeremiah52:17 Kaldiyawa kuwa suka farfasa ginshiƙan tagulla
Jeremiah52:18 Suka kwashe tukwanen ƙarfe
Jeremiah52:19 Suka kuma kwashe ƙananan kwanonin sha
Jeremiah52:20 Tagullar da sarki Sulemanu ya yi waɗannan abubuwa da ita
Jeremiah52:21 Tsawon kowane ginshiƙi kamu goma sha takwas ne
Jeremiah52:22 A kan kowane ginshiƙi
Jeremiah52:23 Akwai siffofin rumman tasa'in da shida da ake gani a gyaffan. Dukan siffofin rumman da suke a kan ragar kewaye
Jeremiah52:24 Shugaban matsara kuma ya ɗauki Seraiya babban firist
Jeremiah52:25 Daga cikin birnin kuma ya ɗauki shugaban sojojin
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradan shugaban matsara ya tafi da waɗannan mutane wurin Sarkin Babila a Ribla
Jeremiah52:27 Sarkin Babila kuwa ya kashe su a Ribla a ƙasar Hamat. Haka aka tafi da mutanen Yahuza bautar talala.
Jeremiah52:28 Wannan shi ne yawan mutanen da Nebukadnezzar ya kai su bauta. A shekara ta bakwai ta sarautarsa
Jeremiah52:29 A shekara ta goma sha takwas ta sarautarsa
Jeremiah52:30 A shekara ta ashirin da uku ta sarautarsa kuma
Jeremiah52:31 A shekarar da Ewil-merodak ya zama Sarkin Babila
Jeremiah52:32 Ewil-merodak ya nuna wa Yekoniya alheri
Jeremiah52:33 Yekoniya ya tuɓe tufafin kurkuku
Jeremiah52:34 Kowace rana akan ba shi kyauta bisa ga umarnin sarki
Lamentations1:1 Urushalima wadda take cike da mutane a dā
Lamentations1:2 Da dare tana kuka mai zafi
Lamentations1:3 Yahuza ta tafi bauta tana shan azaba
Lamentations1:4 Hanyoyin Sihiyona suna baƙin ciki Domin ba mai halartar ƙayyadaddun idodi. Dukan ƙofofinta sun zama kufai
Lamentations1:5 Maƙiyanta sun zama shugabanninta
Lamentations1:6 Dukan darajar Sihiyona ta rabu da ita
Lamentations1:7 A kwanakin wahalarta na rashin wurin zama
Lamentations1:8 Urushalima ta yi zunubi ƙwarai da gaske
Lamentations1:9 Ƙazantarta tana cikin tufafinta
Lamentations1:10 Maƙiyi ya miƙa hannunsa A kan dukan kayanta masu daraja
Lamentations1:11 Dukan jama'arta suna nishi don neman abinci
Lamentations1:12 “Dukanku masu wucewa
Lamentations1:13 “Daga sama ya aukar da wuta a cikin ƙasusuwana. Ya kuma kafa wa ƙafafuna ashibta
Lamentations1:14 “Ubangiji ya tattara laifofina Ya yi karkiya da su
Lamentations1:15 “Ubangiji ya yi watsi da majiya ƙarfina

Lamentations1:20 “Ka duba
Lamentations1:21 “Sun ji yadda nake nishi
Lamentations1:22 “Ka sa mugayen ayyukansu su bayyana a gabanka
Lamentations2:1 Ubangiji ya duhunta Sihiyona saboda fushinsa! Daga Sama kuma ya jefar da darajar Isra'ila a ƙasa. Bai kuma tuna da matashin sawayensa ba A ranar fushinsa.
Lamentations2:2 Dukan wuraren zaman Yakubu
Lamentations2:3 Da zafin fushinsa
Lamentations2:4 Ya ja bakansa kamar abokan gāba
Lamentations2:5 Ubangiji ya zama kamar maƙiyi
Lamentations2:6 Ya rushe Haikalinsa kamar bukka cikin gona
Lamentations2:7 Ubangiji ya wulakanta bagadensa
Lamentations2:8 Ubangiji ya yi niyya Ya mai da garun Sihiyona kufai
Lamentations2:9 Ƙofofinta sun nutse ƙasa
Lamentations2:10 Dattawan Sihiyona suna zaune a ƙasa shiru
Lamentations2:11 Idanuna sun dushe saboda kuka
Lamentations2:12 Suna yi wa uwayensu kuka
Lamentations2:13 Me zan ce miki? Da me zan kwatanta ki
Lamentations2:14 Annabawanki sun gano miki wahayan ƙarya
Lamentations2:15 Dukan masu wucewa suna yin miki tafin raini. Suna yi wa Urushalima tsāki
Lamentations2:16 Maƙiyanki duka sun wage bakinsu gāba da ke

Lamentations2:20 Ya Ubangiji

Lamentations3:1 Ni ne mutumin da ya sha wuyar horon Ubangiji.
Lamentations3:2 Ya kore ni zuwa cikin duhu baƙi ƙirin.
Lamentations3:3 Hakika ikonsa ya yi ta gāba da ni dukan yini.
Lamentations3:4 Ya sa naman jikina da fatar jikina su lalace
Lamentations3:5 Ya kewaye ni da yaƙi
Lamentations3:6 Ya zaunar da ni cikin duhu
Lamentations3:7 Ya kewaye ni da garu don kada in tsere
Lamentations3:8 Ko da yake ina kira
Lamentations3:9 Ya toshe hanyata da sassaƙaƙƙun duwatsu
Lamentations3:10 Ya zamar mini kamar beyar wanda yake fako
Lamentations3:11 Ya bauɗar da ni daga hanyata
Lamentations3:12 Ya ja bakansa
Lamentations3:13 Ya harbe zuciyata da kiban kwarinsa.
Lamentations3:14 Na zama abin dariya ga dukan mutane
Lamentations3:15 Ya shayar da ni da ruwan ɗaci
Lamentations3:16 Ya sa in tauna tsakuwa da haƙorana
Lamentations3:17 An raba ni da salama
Lamentations3:18 Sai na ce
Lamentations3:19 Ka tuna da azabata
Lamentations3:20 Kullum raina yana tunanin azabaina
Lamentations3:21 Da na tuna da wannan
Lamentations3:22 Ƙaunar Ubangiji ba ta ƙarewa
Lamentations3:23 Su sababbi ne kowace safiya
Lamentations3:24 Na ce
Lamentations3:25 Ubangiji mai alheri ne ga waɗanda suke sauraronsa
Lamentations3:26 Yana da kyau a jira ceton Ubangiji da natsuwa
Lamentations3:27 Yana da kyau mutum ya hori kansa tun yana yaro.
Lamentations3:28 Bari ya zauna a kaɗaice
Lamentations3:29 Bari ya kwanta cikin ƙura
Lamentations3:30 Bari ya yarda a mari kumatunsa
Lamentations3:31 Gama Ubangiji ba zai yashe mu har abada ba.
Lamentations3:32 Ko da ya sa ɓacin rai
Lamentations3:33 Gama ba da gangan ba ne yakan wahalar da 'yan adam Ko ya sa su baƙin ciki.
Lamentations3:34 Ubangiji bai yarda a danne 'Yan kurkuku na duniya ba.
Lamentations3:35 Bai kuma yarda a hana wa mutum hakkinsa A gaban Maɗaukaki ba
Lamentations3:36 Ko kuwa a karkatar wa mutum da shari'arsa.
Lamentations3:37 Wa ya umarta
Lamentations3:38 Ba daga bakin Maɗaukaki Alheri da mugunta suke fitowa ne ba?
Lamentations3:39 Don me ɗan adam Zai yi gunaguni a kan hukuncin zunubansa?
Lamentations3:40 Bari mu jarraba
Lamentations3:41 Bari mu roƙi Allah na Sama
Lamentations3:42 “Mun yi zunubi
Lamentations3:43 “Ka yafa fushi
Lamentations3:44 Ka kuma rufe kanka da gajimare Don kada addu'a ta kai wurinka.
Lamentations3:45 Ka maishe mu shara da juji a cikin mutane.
Lamentations3:46 “Dukan maƙiyanmu suna yi mana ba'a.
Lamentations3:47 Tsoro
Lamentations3:48 Hawaye suna gangarawa daga idanuna kamar ruwan koguna
Lamentations3:49 “Hawayena suna ta gangarawa
Lamentations3:50 Har lokacin da Ubangiji daga Sama ya duba
Lamentations3:51 Ganin azabar 'yan matan birnina Ya sa ni baƙin ciki.
Lamentations3:52 “Waɗanda suke maƙiyana ba dalili Sun farauce ni kamar tsuntsu.
Lamentations3:53 Sun jefa ni da rai a cikin rami
Lamentations3:54 Ruwa ya sha kaina
Lamentations3:55 “Ya Ubangiji
Lamentations3:56 Ka kuwa ji muryata. Kada ka rufe kunnenka ga jin kukana na neman taimako.
Lamentations3:57 Sa'ad da na yi kira gare ka
Lamentations3:58 “Ka karɓi da'awata
Lamentations3:59 Ka ga laifin da aka yi mini
Lamentations3:60 Ka ga dukan irin sakayyarsu
Lamentations3:61 “Ya Ubangiji
Lamentations3:62 Leɓunan maƙiyana da tunaninsu Suna gāba da ni dukan yini.
Lamentations3:63 Suna raira mini waƙar zambo sa'ad da suke zaune
Lamentations3:64 “Ya Ubangiji

Lamentations4:1 Ƙaƙa zinariya ta zama duhu! Ƙaƙa zinariya tsantsa ta sāke! Tsarkakakkun duwatsu kuma suna zube A kowane magamin titi.
Lamentations4:2 Darajar samarin Sihiyona Ta kai tamanin zinariya tsantsa. To
Lamentations4:3 Ko diloli ma sukan ba 'ya'yansu mama
Lamentations4:4 Harshen jinjiri ya liƙe a dasashinsa saboda ƙishi
Lamentations4:5 Su waɗanda suka ci abubuwa masu daɗi

Ezekiel25:11 Zan hukunta Mowab

Ezekiel37:7 Sai na yi annabci kamar yadda ya umarce ni. Da na yi annabcin sai aka ji motsi da girgiza. Sai ƙasusuwan suka harhaɗu da juna

Ezekiel37:21 sai ka faɗa musu

Ezekiel37:26 Zan ƙulla dawwamammen alkawarin salama da su. Zan sa musu albarka

Ezekiel37:28 Sa'an nan al'ummai za su sani

Ezekiel40:5 Abin da na gani Haikali ne. Akwai katanga kewaye da filin Haikalin. Tsawon karan awon kuma da yake a hannun mutumin kamu shida ne. Sai ya auna faɗin katangar ya sami kamu shida
Ezekiel40:6 Ya tafi kuma wajen ƙofar gabas ya hau matakanta

Ezekiel40:9 Sa'an nan ya auna shirayin bakin ƙofar kamu takwas ne. Sai kuma ya auna ginshiƙan shirayin kamu biyu ne. Shirayin ƙofar yana fuskantar ciki.

Ezekiel40:25 Akwai tagogi kewaye da ƙofar

Ezekiel40:28 Ya kuma kai ni fili na can ciki
Ezekiel40:29 Haka kuma ɗakunanta na 'yan tsaro
Ezekiel40:30 Akwai shirayi kewaye

Ezekiel40:36 Haka kuma ɗakunanta na 'yan tsaro
Ezekiel40:37 Ginshiƙai suna fuskantar filin da yake waje. Aka zana siffar itatuwan dabino a kan ginshiƙanta a kowane gefe. Ita ma matakanta takwas ne.

Ezekiel41:1 Sai ya kai ni cikin Haikalin

Ezekiel41:10

Ezekiel41:16

Ezekiel41:18

Ezekiel46:1 “Ni Ubangiji Allah na ce za a rufe ƙofar fili ta can ciki wadda take fuskantar gabas dukan ranaku shida na aiki
Ezekiel46:2 Sarki zai shiga ta ƙofar shirayi daga waje
Ezekiel46:3 Jama'ar ƙasar za su yi wa Ubangiji sujada a bakin wannan ƙofa a ranakun Asabar da a amaryar wata.
Ezekiel46:4 Hadaya ta ƙonawa da sarki zai miƙa wa Ubangiji a ranar Asabar 'yan raguna shida ne da rago ɗaya marasa lahani.
Ezekiel46:5 Gārin hadaya da za a yi tare da rago wajen garwa guda ne. Wanda za a yi tare da 'yan raguna kuwa zai zama gwargwadon ƙarfinsa. Zai ba da mai wajen kwalaba shida domin kowace garwa ta gari.
Ezekiel46:6 A amaryar wata kuwa zai miƙa bijimi
Ezekiel46:7 Gārin hadayar da za a yi tare da bijimin wajen garwa guda ne
Ezekiel46:8 Sa'ad da sarki zai shiga
Ezekiel46:9 “Sa'ad da jama'ar ƙasar sun zo yi wa Ubangiji sujada a lokatan ƙayyadaddun idodi
Ezekiel46:10 Sa'ad da suka shiga
Ezekiel46:11 A lokacin idodi da ƙayyadaddun lokatai
Ezekiel46:12 “Sa'ad da sarki ya kawo hadayar ƙonawa ko hadayar salama ta yardar rai ga Ubangiji
Ezekiel46:13 “Kowace safiya za a yi hadaya ta ƙonawa ga Ubangiji da ɗan rago bana ɗaya marar lahani.
Ezekiel46:14 Tare da hadaya ta ƙonawa
Ezekiel46:15 Za a ba da ɗan rago
Ezekiel46:16 “Ni Ubangiji Allah na ce
Ezekiel46:17 Amma idan sarki ya yi wa wani daga cikin barorinsa kyauta daga cikin gādonsa

Ezekiel46:19 Sai mutumin ya bi da ni ta hanyar da take gefen ƙofa mai fuskantar arewa
Ezekiel46:20 Sai ya ce mini
Ezekiel46:21 Ya kuma kai ni a farfajiyar waje
Ezekiel46:22 Girman kowane ɗan fili tsawonsa kamu arba'in ne
Ezekiel46:23 A cikin kowane ɗan fili na kusurwa huɗu ɗin akwai jerin duwatsu. Aka gina murhu ƙarƙashin jerin duwatsun.
Ezekiel46:24 Sa'an nan ya ce mini

Daniel7:28 “Ni Daniyel na firgita ƙwarai
Daniel8:1 A shekara ta uku ta sarautar Belshazzar
Daniel8:2 A wahayin sai na gani ina a bakin kogin Ulai a Shushan
Daniel8:3 Da na ta da idanuna
Daniel8:4 Na ga ragon ya kai karo wajen yamma da wajen kudu

Daniel8:7 Na ga ya zo kusa da ragon
Daniel8:8 Sa'an nan bunsurun ya ɗaukaka kansa ƙwarai
Daniel8:9 Wani ƙaramin ƙaho kuma ya tsiro daga cikin ɗayansu
Daniel8:10 Ya ƙasaita
Daniel8:11 Ya ɗaukaka kansa
Daniel8:12 Saboda zunubi sai aka ba da runduna duk da hadayar ƙonawa ta yau da kullum ga ƙahon. Sai ya yi watsi da gaskiya
Daniel8:13 Sai na ji wani mai tsarki yana magana
Daniel8:14 Ya ce mini
Daniel8:15 Sa'ad da ni Daniyel
Daniel8:16 Na kuma ji muryar mutum a gāɓar Ulai ta ce
Daniel8:17 Don haka sai ya zo kusa da inda nake tsaye. Da ya zo sai na firgita
Daniel8:18 Sa'ad da yake magana da ni
Daniel8:19 Ya ce mini
Daniel8:20 “Ragon nan mai ƙaho biyu da ka gani
Daniel8:21 Bunsurun kuwa Sarkin Hellas ne. Babban ƙahon nan da yake tsakanin idanunsa shi ne sarki na farko.
Daniel8:22 Ƙahoni huɗu da suka tsiro bayan karyewar na farin
Daniel8:23 “A wajen ƙarshen mulkinsu
Daniel8:24 Zai ƙasaita

Daniel8:26 Wannan wahayi na kwanaki wanda aka nuna maka gaskiya ne
Daniel8:27 Ni Daniyel kuwa na siƙe

Daniel9:3 Sai na mai da hankalina wajen Ubangiji Allah
Daniel9:4 Na yi addu'a ga Ubangiji Allahna

Daniel9:6 Ba mu kasa kunne ga bayinka annabawa ba
Daniel9:7 Ya Ubangiji

Daniel9:10 Ba mu yi biyayya ga Ubangiji Allahnmu ta wurin kiyaye dokokinsa ba

Daniel9:26 Za ta kasance har shekara ɗari huɗu da talatin da huɗu

Daniel10:5 Da na ɗaga kaina sai na ga wani sāye da rigar lilin
Daniel10:6 Jikinsa kamar lu'ulu'u yake
Daniel10:7 Ni kaɗai na ga wahayin
Daniel10:8 Aka bar ni
Daniel10:9 Sa'an nan na ji muryarsa
Daniel10:10 Sai hannu ya taɓa ni
Daniel10:11 Ya ce mini
Daniel10:12 Sai ya ce mini
Daniel10:13 Shugaban ƙasar Farisa ya tare ni har kwana ashirin da ɗaya
Daniel10:14 Na zo ne don in ganar da kai a kan abin da zai faru da mutanenka nan gaba
Daniel10:15 Sa'ad da ya faɗa mini wannan magana

Daniel11:1 A shekara ta fari ta sarautar Dariyus Bamediye
Daniel11:2 “Yanzu zan faɗa maka gaskiya. Za a ƙara samun sarakuna uku a Farisa
Daniel11:3 “Sa'an nan wani sarki babba zai taso wanda zai yi mulki da babban iko yadda ya ga dama.
Daniel11:4 Sa'ad da ya ƙasaita mulkinsa zai faɗi
Daniel11:5 “Sarkin kudu zai yi ƙarfi
Daniel11:6 Bayan waɗansu shekaru za su ƙulla zumunci. Sarkin kudu zai aurar wa sarkin arewa da 'yarsa don sāda zumunci
Daniel11:7 Ba za a daɗe ba
Daniel11:8 Zai kwashe gumakansu ganima
Daniel11:9 Bayan wannan sarkin arewa zai kai wa sarkin kudu yaƙi
Daniel11:10 “'Ya'yansa maza za su tara babbar rundunar yaƙi. Ɗayansu zai mamaye kamar rigyawa
Daniel11:11 Sarkin kudu zai husata ya kai wa sarkin arewa yaƙi
Daniel11:12 Ganin ya kashe sojoji masu ɗumbun yawa
Daniel11:13 Sarkin arewa kuwa zai tara babbar rundunar soja fiye da ta dā. Bayan waɗansu shekaru kuwa zai kama hanya da babbar rundunar soja
Daniel11:14 “A waɗannan kwanaki mutane da yawa za su tashi gāba da sarkin kudu. Amma waɗansu 'yan kama-karya za su taso daga jama'arka da niyya su cika abin da wahayin ya ce
Daniel11:15 Sa'an nan sarkin arewa zai zo ya gina mahaurai a jikin garun birni don ya ci birnin da yaƙi. Sojojin kudu kuwa ba za su iya tsayawa ba
Daniel11:16 Amma wanda ya kawo masa yaƙin zai yi yadda ya ga dama
Daniel11:17 Zai yunƙuro da dukan ƙarfin mulkinsa
Daniel11:18 Daga nan zai yunƙura zuwa ƙasashen gaɓar teku
Daniel11:19 Sa'an nan zai juya
Daniel11:20 “Wani sarki zai ɗauki matsayinsa
Daniel11:21 “Wani kuma rainanne zai maye gurbin wancan
Daniel11:22 Zai shafe rundunonin sojoji har da rantsattsen shugaba.
Daniel11:23 Daga lokacin da aka ƙulla yarjejeniya da shi
Daniel11:24 Ba zato ba tsammani zai kai wa lardi mafi arziki hari. Zai aikata abin da kakanninsa ba su taɓa yi ba. Zai rarraba wa mabiyansa kwason yaƙi
Daniel11:25 “Zai iza kansa ya yi ƙarfin hali ya kai wa sarkin kudu yaƙi da babbar rundunar soja. Sarkin kudu zai haɗa babbar rundunar soja mai ƙarfi don yaƙin
Daniel11:26 Waɗanda suke na jikinsa
Daniel11:27 Sarakunan nan biyu sun sa mugunta a ransu. Za su zauna a tebur guda su yi ta shara wa juna ƙarya
Daniel11:28 “Sarkin arewa zai koma gida da dukiya mai ɗumbun yawa. Zuciyarsa za ta yi gāba da tsattsarkan alkawari. Zai yi yadda ya ga dama sa'an nan ya koma ƙasarsa.
Daniel11:29 “A ƙayyadadden lokaci kuma zai koma kudu
Daniel11:30 gama jiragen ruwa na Kittim za su tasar masa
Daniel11:31 Sojojinsa za su ɓata tsattsarkan wuri da kagararsa. Za su kuma hana yin hadayu na yau da kullum
Daniel11:32 Waɗanda suka ta da alkawarin kuma
Daniel11:33 Waɗansu daga cikin mutane waɗanda suke da hikima
Daniel11:34 Sa'ad da suka fāɗi ba za su sami wani taimakon kirki ba
Daniel11:35 Waɗanda suke da hikima
Daniel11:36 “Sa'an nan sarki zai yi yadda ya ga dama. Zai ɗaukaka kansa
Daniel11:37 Ba zai kula da gumakan kakanninsa ba
Daniel11:38 A maimakon haka zai girmama gunkin kagarai
Daniel11:39 Zai tasar wa kagara mafi ƙarfi da taimakon baƙon gunki. Waɗanda suka yarda da shi
Daniel11:40 “A lokaci na ƙarshe sarkin kudu zai tasar masa
Daniel11:41 Zai shiga kyakkyawar ƙasa ya kashe dubban mutane. Amma ƙasar Edom
Daniel11:42 Zai kai wa waɗansu ƙasashe yaƙi
Daniel11:43 Zai mallaki dukiyoyi na zinariya
Daniel11:44 Labarin da zai zo masa daga gabas da arewa zai firgita shi
Daniel11:45 Zai kafa manyan alfarwai na sarauta a tsakanin teku da tsattsarkan dutse. Amma zai mutu ba kuwa wanda zai taimake shi.”
Daniel12:1 “A wannan lokaci Mika'ilu babban shugaba wanda yake lura da jama'arka zai bayyana. A lokacin za a yi tashin hankali irin wanda ba a taɓa yi ba

Daniel12:3 Waɗanda suke da hikima za su haskaka kamar sararin sama

Joel1:1 Maganar Ubangiji zuwa ga Yowel
Joel1:2 Ku dattawa
Joel1:3 Ku faɗa wa 'ya'yanku labarinsa
Joel1:4 Abin da ɗango ya bari fara ta ci
Joel1:5 Ku farka
Joel1:6 Rundunar ta aukar wa ƙasarmu
Joel1:7 Ta lalatar da kurangar inabinmu
Joel1:8 Ya jama'a

Joel1:11 Ya ku manoma

Joel1:17 Itatuwa sun mutu a busasshiyar ƙasa

Joel2:1 Ku busa ƙaho
Joel2:2 Za ta zama rana ce mai duhu dulum

Obadiah1:4 Ko da yake kina shawagi can sama kamar gaggafa

Obadiah1:11 A ranan nan ka tsaya kawai

Obadiah1:13 Ba daidai ba ne ka shiga ƙofar jama'ata A ranar da suke shan masifa. Ba daidai ba ne ka yi murna A kan bala'in ɗan'uwanka. Ba daidai ba ne ka washe dukiyarsa A ranar masifarsa.

Zechariah14:1 Ga ranar Ubangiji tana zuwa sa'ad da za a raba ganimar da aka ƙwace daga gare ku a kan idonku.
Zechariah14:2 Gama zan tattara dukan al'ummai su yi yaƙi da Urushalima. Za a ci birnin
Zechariah14:3 Sa'an nan Ubangiji zai tafi ya yi yaƙi da waɗannan al'ummai kamar yadda ya yi a dā.
Zechariah14:4 A wannan rana ƙafafunsa za su tsaya a bisa Dutsen Zaitun wanda yake wajen gabas da Urushalima. Dutsen Zaitun zai tsage biyu daga gabas zuwa yamma
Zechariah14:5 Za ku gudu zuwa kwarin duwatsuna
Zechariah14:6 A wannan rana ba haske. Masu ba da haske za su dushe.
Zechariah14:7 Ubangiji ne ya san wannan rana. Ba rana ba dare. Da maraice ma akwai haske.

Zechariah14:9 A ranar
Zechariah14:10 Ƙasa dukka za ta zama fili
Zechariah14:11 Za a zauna cikin Urushalima lami lafiya

Zechariah14:13 A wannan rana babbar gigicewa daga wurin Ubangiji za ta faɗo musu

Zechariah14:15 Annoba irin wannan kuma za ta faɗo wa dawakai da alfadarai
Zechariah14:16 Sa'an nan wanda ya ragu daga cikin dukan al'umman da suka kai wa Urushalima yaƙi zai riƙa haurawa zuwa Urushalima kowace shekara
Zechariah14:17 Idan kuwa wata al'umma a duniya ba ta haura zuwa Urushalima domin ta yi wa Ubangiji Maɗaukakin Sarki sujada ba
Zechariah14:18 Idan al'ummar Masar ba ta halarci Idin Bukkoki ba
Zechariah14:19 Wannan shi ne hukuncin da za a yi wa Masar da dukan al'umman da suka ƙi halartar Idin Bukkoki.
Zechariah14:20 A wannan rana za a zāna waɗannan kalmomi
Zechariah14:21 Kowace tukunya da take a Urushalima da Yahuza za ta zama tsattsarka ga Ubangiji Mai Runduna domin dukan masu miƙa hadaya su ɗauka su dafa naman hadaya a cikinsu. A wannan rana ba za a ƙara samun mai ciniki a Haikalin Ubangiji Mai Runduna ba.

Matthew26:34 Yesu ya ce masa
Matthew26:35 Bitrus ya ce masa
Matthew26:36 Sa'an nan Yesu ya zo da su wani wuri da ake kira Gatsemani. Ya ce wa almajiransa
Matthew26:37 Sai ya ɗauki Bitrus da 'ya'yan nan na Zabadi biyu
Matthew26:38 Sai ya ce musu
Matthew26:39 Da ya ci gaba kaɗan
Matthew26:40 Ya komo wurin almajiran
Matthew26:41 Ku zauna a faɗake
Matthew26:42 Har wa yau a komawa ta biyu
Matthew26:43 Har yanzu dai ya dawo ya ga suna barci
Matthew26:44 Har wa yau ya sāke barinsu
Matthew26:45 Sai ya komo wurin almajiran
Matthew26:46 Ku tashi mu tafi. Kun ga
Matthew26:47 Kafin ya rufe baki ga Yahuza
Matthew26:48 To
Matthew26:49 Nan da nan ya matso wurin Yesu
Matthew26:50 Yesu ya ce masa
Matthew26:51 Sai ga ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suke tare da Yesu ya miƙa hannu ya zaro takobinsa
Matthew26:52 Sai Yesu ya ce masa
Matthew26:53 Kuna tsammani ba ni da ikon neman taimako gun Ubana ba
Matthew26:54 To
Matthew26:55 Nan take Yesu ya ce wa taron jama'a
Matthew26:56 Amma duk wannan ya auku ne domin a cika littattafan annabawa.” Daga nan duk almajiran suka yashe shi
Matthew26:57 Sai waɗanda suka kama Yesu suka tafi da shi wurin Kayafa
Matthew26:58 Amma Bitrus ya bi shi daga nesa
Matthew26:59 To

Matthew26:61 suka ce
Matthew26:62 Sai babban firist ya miƙe ya ce
Matthew26:63 Amma Yesu na shiru. Sai babban firist ya ce masa
Matthew26:64 Sai Yesu ya ce masa
Matthew26:65 Sai babban firist ya kyakketa tufafinsa
Matthew26:66 Me kuka gani?” Suka amsa suka ce
Matthew26:67 Sai suka tattofa masa yau a fuska
Matthew26:68 suna cewa
Matthew26:69 To
Matthew26:70 Amma ya musa a gabansu duka ya ce
Matthew26:71 Da ya fito zaure
Matthew26:72 Sai ya sāke musawa har da rantsuwa ya ce
Matthew26:73 Jim kaɗan sai na tsaitsayen suka matso
Matthew26:74 Sai ya fara la'anar kansa
Matthew26:75 Sai Bitrus ya tuna da maganar Yesu cewa
Matthew27:1 Da gari ya waye sai duk manyan firistoci da shugabannin jama'a suka yi shawara a kan Yesu su kashe shi.
Matthew27:2 Sai suka ɗaure shi
Matthew27:3 Sa'ad da Yahuza mai bashe shi ya ga an yanke masa hukuncin kisa
Matthew27:4 ya ce
Matthew27:5 Sai ya watsar da kuɗin azurfan nan a Haikali
Matthew27:6 Amma manyan firistoci suka tsince kuɗin suka ce
Matthew27:7 Sai suka yi shawara
Matthew27:8 Don haka
Matthew27:9 Ta haka aka cika faɗar Annabi Irmiya cewa
Matthew27:10 suka sayi filin maginin tukwane da su
Matthew27:11 To
Matthew27:12 Amma da manyan firistoci da shugabanni suka kai ƙararrakinsa
Matthew27:13 Sai Bilatus ya ce masa
Matthew27:14 Amma bai ba shi wata amsa
Matthew27:15 To
Matthew27:16 A lokacin kuwa da wani shahararren ɗan sarƙa
Matthew27:17 Da suka taru sai Bilatus ya ce musu
Matthew27:18 Don ya sani saboda hassada ne suka bashe shi.
Matthew27:19 Banda haka kuma
Matthew27:20 To
Matthew27:21 Sai mai mulki ya sāke ce musu
Matthew27:22 Bilatus ya ce musu
Matthew27:23 Ya ce
Matthew27:24 Da Bilatus ya ga bai rinjaye su ba
Matthew27:25 Sai duk jama'a suka amsa suka ce
Matthew27:26 Sa'an nan ya sakar musu Barabbas. Bayan ya yi wa Yesu bulala
Matthew27:27 Sai sojan mai mulki suka kai Yesu cikin fadar mai mulki
Matthew27:28 Sai suka tuɓe shi
Matthew27:29 Suka yi wani rawani na ƙaya
Matthew27:30 Suka tattofa masa yau
Matthew27:31 Da suka gama yi masa ba'a
Matthew27:32 Suna tafiya ke nan
Matthew27:33 Da suka isa wurin da ake kira Golgota
Matthew27:34 suka miƙa masa ruwan inabi gauraye da wani abu mai ɗaci yă sha
Matthew27:35 Da suka gicciye shi
Matthew27:36 Suka zauna a nan suna tsaronsa.
Matthew27:37 A daidai kansa aka kafa sanarwar laifinsa cewa
Matthew27:38 Sai kuma aka gicciye 'yan fashi biyu tare da shi
Matthew27:39 Masu wucewa suka yi ta yi masa baƙar magana
Matthew27:40 suna cewa
Matthew27:41 Haka kuma manyan firistoci da malaman Attaura da shugabanni suka riƙa yi masa ba'a
Matthew27:42 “Ya ceci waɗansu
Matthew27:43 Yā dogara ga Allah
Matthew27:44 Har 'yan fashin nan da aka gicciye su tare ma
Matthew27:45 To
Matthew27:46 Wajen ƙarfe uku kuma sai Yesu ya ɗaga murya da ƙarfi ya ce
Matthew27:47 Da waɗansu na tsaitsayen suka ji haka
Matthew27:48 Sai nan da nan ɗaya daga cikinsu ya yiwo gudu
Matthew27:49 Amma sauran suka ce
Matthew27:50 Sai Yesu ya sāke ɗaga murya da ƙarfi
Matthew27:51 Sai labulen da yake cikin Haikalin ya tsage gida biyu
Matthew27:52 Aka bubbuɗe kaburbura
Matthew27:53 Suka firfito daga kaburburan
Matthew27:54 Sa'ad da jarumin da waɗanda suke tare da shi suna tsaron Yesu suka ga rawar ƙasa da kuma abin da ya auku
Matthew27:55 Akwai kuma waɗansu mata da yawa a can suna hange daga nesa
Matthew27:56 A cikinsu da Maryamu Magadaliya
Matthew27:57 Maraice lis sai wani mai arziki ya zo
Matthew27:58 Ya je wurin Bilatus ya roƙa a ba shi jikin Yesu. Sai Bilatus ya yi umarni a ba shi.
Matthew27:59 Yusufu ya ɗauki jikin
Matthew27:60 ya sa shi a wani sabon kabari da ya tanadar wa kansa
Matthew27:61 Maryamu Magadaliya da ɗaya Maryamun suna nan zaune a gaban kabarin.
Matthew27:62 Kashegari
Matthew27:63 suka ce
Matthew27:64 Saboda haka sai ka yi umarni a tsare kabarin nan sosai har rana ta uku
Matthew27:65 Sai Bilatus ya ce musu

Matthew28:1 To

Mark1:1 Farkon bisharar Yesu Almasihu
Mark1:2 Yadda yake a rubuce a littafin Annabi Ishaya cewa
Mark1:3 Muryar mai kira a jeji tana cewa
Mark1:4 Yahaya Maibaftisma ya bayyana a jeji
Mark1:5 Sai duk mutanen ƙasar Yahudiya
Mark1:6 Yahaya kuwa na sanye da tufar gashin raƙumi
Mark1:7 Ya yi wa'azi ya ce
Mark1:8 Ni da ruwa na yi muku baftisma
Mark1:9 Sai ya zamana a wannan lokaci Yesu ya zo daga Nazarat ta ƙasar Galili. Yahaya ya yi masa baftisma a Kogin Urdun.
Mark1:10 Da fitowarsa daga ruwan sai ya ga sama ta dāre
Mark1:11 Aka ji wata murya daga Sama ta ce

Mark1:13 Yana jeji har kwana arba'in

Mark5:1 Suka iso hayin teku a ƙasar Garasinawa.

Luke1:2 daidai yadda waɗanda suke shaidu tun farkon al'amari
Luke1:3 da yake kuma na bi diddigin kowane abu daidai tun farko
Luke1:4 domin kă san ingancin maganar da aka sanar da kai baki da baki.
Luke1:5 A zamanin Hirudus
Luke1:6 Dukansu biyu kuwa masu adalci ne a gaban Allah
Luke1:7 Amma ba su da ɗa
Luke1:8 Ana nan
Luke1:9 bisa ga al'adar hidimar firistoci
Luke1:10 A lokacin ƙona turare kuwa duk taron jama'a suna waje
Luke1:11 sai wani mala'ikan Ubangiji ya bayyana gare shi

Acts12:1 A lokacin nan kuwa sarki Hirudus ya fara gwada wa waɗansu 'yan Ikkilisiya tasku
Acts12:2 har ma ya sare Yakubu ɗan'uwan Yahaya da takobi.

Acts12:4 Da ya kama shi

Ephesians1:1 Daga Bulus
Ephesians1:2 Alheri da salama na Allah ubanmu
Ephesians1:3 Yabo yā tabbata ga Allahn Ubangijinmu Yesu Almasihu
Ephesians1:4 domin kuwa ya zaɓe mu a cikin Almasihu tun ba a halicci duniya ba
Ephesians1:5 Ya ƙaddara mu mu zama 'ya'yansa ta wurin Yesu Almasihu
Ephesians1:6 domin mu yabi ɗaukakar alherinsa wanda ya ba mu kyauta hannu sake saboda Ƙaunataccensa.

Colossians4:17 Ku kuma faɗa wa Arkibus ya mai da hankali ya cika hidimar da Ubangiji ya sa shi.

1Thessalonians1:1 Daga Bulus
1Thessalonians1:2 A kullum muna gode wa Allah saboda ku duka
1Thessalonians1:3 ba ma fāsa tunawa da aikinku na bangaskiya a gaban Allahnmu
1Thessalonians1:4 Domin mun sani
1Thessalonians1:5 domin bishararmu ba da magana kawai ta zo muku ba
1Thessalonians1:6 har kuka zama masu koyi da mu
1Thessalonians1:7 Ku ma har kuka zama abin koyi ga dukan masu ba da gaskiya a ƙasar Makidoniya da ta Akaya.

1Thessalonians1:9 Domin su da kansu suke ba da labarin irin ziyartarku da muka yi

Titus1:1 Daga Bulus
Titus1:2 duk wannan kuwa saboda begen nan ne ga rai madawwami da Allah ya yi alkawari tun fil'azal
Titus1:3 ya kuwa bayyana maganarsa a lokacin da ya ƙayyade
Titus1:4 zuwa ga Titus
Titus1:5 Wannan shi ya sa na bar ka a Karita
Titus1:6 sai wanda ya kasance marar abin zargi
Titus1:7 Lalle ne kuwa
Titus1:8 Amma yă kasance mai yi wa baƙi alheri
Titus1:9 mai riƙe da tabbatacciyar maganar nan kankan
Titus1:10 Don kuwa akwai kangararrun mutane da yawa
Titus1:11 Lalle ne a kwaɓe su
Titus1:12 Wani annabi na Karitawa ya ce
Titus1:13 Shaidar nan tasa kuwa gaskiya ce. Saboda haka
Titus1:14 a maimakon su mai da hankali ga almarar Yahudawa
Titus1:15 Ga masu tsarkin rai duk al'amarinsu mai tsarki ne
Titus1:16 Suna cewa sun san Allah
Titus2:1 Amma kai kam
Titus2:2 Dattawa su kasance masu kamunkai
Titus2:3 Haka kuma
Titus2:4 ta haka su koya wa mata masu ƙuruciya su so mazansu da 'ya'yansu
Titus2:5 su kuma kasance natsattsu
Titus2:6 Haka kuma
Titus2:7 Kai ma sai ka zama gurbi na aiki nagari ta kowace hanya
Titus2:8 da kuma sahihiyar maganar da ba za a kushe mata ba
Titus2:9 Bayi su yi biyayya ga iyayengijinsu

James1:1 Daga Yakubu
James1:2 Ya ku 'yan'uwana
James1:3 Domin kun san jarrabawar bangaskiyarku takan haifi jimiri.
James1:4 Sai kuma jimiri ya yi cikakken aikinsa
James1:5 In waninku ya rasa hikima
James1:6 Amma fa sai ya roƙa da bangaskiya
James1:7 Kada irin mutumin nan mai zuciya biyu
James1:8 
James1:9 Ƙasƙantaccen ɗan'uwa yă yi taƙama da ɗaukakarsa.
James1:10 Mai arziki kuma yă yi alfarma da ƙasƙancinsa
James1:11 In rana ta tāke da ƙunarta
James1:12 Albarka tā tabbata ga mai jimirin gwaji
James1:13 Duk wanda ake jarabta
James1:14 Amma kowane mutum yakan jarabtu in mugun burinsa ya ruɗe shi
James1:15 Mugun buri kuma in ya yi ciki
James1:16 Kada fa a yaudare ku
James1:17 Kowace kyakkyawar baiwa
James1:18 Bisa ga nufinsa ya kawo mu ta maganar gaskiya
James1:19 Ya 'yan'uwana ƙaunatattu
James1:20 don fushin mutum ba ya aikata adalci.
James1:21 Saboda haka
James1:22 Amma ku zama masu aikata maganar
James1:23 Don duk wanda yake mai jin maganar ne kawai
James1:24 don yakan dubi fuskarsa ne kawai ya tafi
James1:25 Amma duk mai duba cikakkiyar ka'idar nan ta 'yanci
James1:26 In wani yana zaton shi mai addini ne
James1:27 Addini sahihi kuma marar aibu a gaban Allah Ubanmu

3John1:7 domin saboda sunan nan ne suka fito
3John1:8 Domin haka ya kamata mu karɓi irin mutanen nan

Revelation19:1 Bayan wannan na ji kamar wata sowa mai ƙarfi ta ƙasaitaccen taro a Sama
Revelation19:2 Don hukuncinsa daidai yake
Revelation19:3 Sai suka sāke yin sowa
Revelation19:4 Sai dattawan nan ashirin da huɗu
Revelation19:5 Sai aka ji wata murya daga kursiyin
Revelation19:6 Sai na ji kamar wata sowar ƙasaitaccen taro
Revelation19:7 Mu yi ta murna da farin ciki matuƙa
Revelation19:8 An yardar mata ta sa tufafin lallausan lilin mai ɗaukar ido
Revelation19:9 Sai mala'ikan ya ce mini
Revelation19:10 Sai na fāɗi a gabansa
Revelation19:11 Sai na ga sama ta dāre
Revelation19:12 Idanunsa kamar harshen wuta suke
Revelation19:13 Yana saye da riga wadda aka tsoma a jini
Revelation19:14 Rundunonin Sama
Revelation19:15 Daga cikin bakinsa wani kakkaifan takobi yake fitowa
Revelation19:16 Da wani suna a rubuce a jikin rigarsa
Revelation19:17 Sa'an nan na ga wani mala'ika tsaye a jikin rana. Sai kuma ya kira dukkan tsuntsaye da suke tashi a sararin sama
Revelation19:18 ku ci naman sarakuna
Revelation19:19 Sai na ga dabbar nan
Revelation19:20 Sai aka kama dabbar
Revelation19:21 Sauran kuwa aka sare su da takobin wanda yake a kan doki
Revelation20:1 Sa'an nan na ga wani mala'ika yana saukowa daga Sama
Revelation20:2 Sai ya kama macijin nan
Revelation20:3 ya jefa shi mahallakar
Revelation20:4 Sa'an nan na ga kursiyai
Revelation20:5 Sauran matattu kuwa
Revelation20:6 Duk wanda yake da rabo a tashin nan na farko
Revelation20:7 Bayan shekaran nan dubu sun ƙare
Revelation20:8 ya kuma fito ya yaudari al'ummai waɗanda suke kusurwoyin nan huɗu na duniya
Revelation20:9 Sai kuma su bazu
Revelation20:10 Shi kuwa Ibilis mayaudarinsu
Revelation20:11 Sa'an nan na ga wani babban kursiyi fari
Revelation20:12 Sai na ga matattu manya da yara
Revelation20:13 Sai teku ta ba da matattun da suke a cikinta
Revelation20:14 Sa'an nan aka jefa mutuwa da Hades a tafkin nan na wuta. Wannan ita ce mutuwa ta biyu
Revelation20:15 Duk wanda ba a sami sunansa a rubuce a Littafin Rai ba
Revelation21:1 Sa'an nan na ga sabuwar sama da sabuwar ƙasa
Revelation21:2 Sai na ga tsattsarkan birni kuma
Revelation21:3 Na kuma ji wata murya mai ƙara daga kursiyin
Revelation21:4 zai share musu dukkan hawaye. Ba kuma sauran mutuwa
Revelation21:5 Sai na zaune a kan kursiyin ya ce
Revelation21:6 Sai ya ce mini
Revelation21:7 Duk wanda ya ci nasara
Revelation21:8 Amma matsorata
Revelation21:9 Sai kuma ɗaya daga cikin mala'ikun nan bakwai
Revelation21:10 Sai ya ɗauke ni
Revelation21:11 yana tare da ɗaukakar Allah. Hasken birnin yana ƙyalƙyali kamar wani irin nadirin dutse mai daraja
Revelation21:12 Yana da babban garu mai tsawo
Revelation21:13 a gabas
Revelation21:14 Garun birnin kuwa
Revelation21:15 Shi wanda ya yi mini magana kuwa yana da sandar awo ta zinariya
Revelation21:16 Birnin murabba'i ne
Revelation21:17 Ya kuma auna garunsa
Revelation21:18 Garun kuwa da yasfa aka gina shi
Revelation21:19 An kuma ƙawata harsasan garun birnin da kowane irin dutse mai daraja. Yasfa shi ne na farko
Revelation21:20 na biyar onis
Revelation21:21 Ƙofofin gari goma sha biyun nan kuwa lu'ulu'u ne goma sha biyun
Revelation21:22 Ban kuwa ga wani Haikali a birnin ba
Revelation21:23 Birnin kuwa ba ya bukatar rana ko wata su haskaka shi
Revelation21:24 Da haskensa al'ummai za su yi tafiya. Sarakunan duniya za su kawo darajarsu a gare shi.
Revelation21:25 Ƙofofinsa kuwa ba za a rufe su da rana ba har abada
Revelation21:26 Za a kuma kawo darajar al'ummai da girmansu a gare shi.
Revelation21:27 Amma ko kaɗan ba wani abu marar tsarki da zai shiga cikinsa

Revelation22:2 ta tsakiyar hanyar birnin kuma

Revelation22:4 za su kuma ga fuskarsa
Revelation22:5 Ba za a ƙara yin dare ba
Revelation22:6 Sai ya ce mini
